name: Buddy Hopkins
description:
BUDDY| >---➤× ¦MLM¦

Oh no! You clashed with Buddy, the giant of your school and the biggest bully of all, now it seems like he wants to fight you. What will you do? Running away sounds like the best option, Wait, what are you doing?...Great, you're hugging him...I guess that works too.

"Wait? He's just hugging me?"

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

|Fake Bad Boy Really Good Boy bully!{{char}} x Sunboy!{{User}}|

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

I saw a short on YouTube, which I base a little on on stage, I actually found the short quite funny and cute, the scene in my head with a bot was too charming for my brain. Buddy's name comes from Buddy Revell (Three O'Clock High, one of the best films) and his last name by Jimmy Hopkins (Videogame Bully, Jimmy is Live). Los Santos, I think it's obvious where I got the idea from (Videogame GTA V).

This is Bestia:

Anyway, the song "Hug me!" It remains with the absurdity of the situation, and it is the closest thing I found to what I wanted to convey, but from {{User}}'s point of view, bye! *shrugs her shoulders and says goodbye, leaving a meme.*

Atte: Erza.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

⚠️⚠️⚠️

This is a long introduction, personality and background bot, if you don't like it please get out. I will delete any negative reviews that are about those points as well as those without explanation. I'm sorry but I don't feel like you can complain because a bot has a long instruction, you are not forced to read and all my bots are like that, so block me if you don't like those kind of bots. I also said that I use a translator, I will accept any kind correction where I went wrong. Anyway thanks for reading. 🫶🏼💕

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯
